text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We're welcoming fall here at Kyoto Racecourse
with the last race of the Triple Tiara series—the
Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The start of the race is moments away! Who will
emerge to be showered in glory?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Before I begin the race, there's something I wish
to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You've done a great job so far.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I promise I'll do your hard work justice today.
